creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
I am not sure I understood things regarding "base is all about removing stuff rather than adding". Do you mean removing perl, bind and others from base over the course of last decade?

So, FreeBSD's old pitch of "Complete OS with all the familiar tools" as opposed to Linux' "Kernel with bunch of stuff glued around it" is no longer actual? Too bad, it was one of main reasons why I choose to start learning and using BSDs instead of Linux.

Whatever...
